description_html:
The Aero Innovation Challenge, is an exciting platform for aspiring innovators, technologists, and aerospace enthusiasts to showcase their creativity and problem-solving skills. This challenge aims to address real-world problems in the aerospace sector by encouraging participants to design, develop, and present innovative solutions that could revolutionize the industry.
Participants will get the opportunity to work on cutting-edge topics like sustainable aviation, advanced propulsion systems, satellite technologies, or unmanned aerial systems. With a focus on creativity, feasibility, and impact, the challenge fosters interdisciplinary collaboration, technical expertise, and out-of-the-box thinking.

Theme: Hybrid and Electric Flight Systems:

Team Description:

  • A team of a maximum 3 participants is allowed.
  • Participants can be interdisciplinary, across years and from different colleges. 

The competition consists of two rounds:

  • Abstract Submission Round
  • Final Presentation Round
location: Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufaturing Kancheepuram
